scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.check:backend: PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/vidquery-pycache python3 -m py_compile backend/main.py backend/src/*.py backend/src/chain/*.py backend/src/database/*.py backend/src/prompt_templates/*.py backend/src/schema/*.py backend/src/vector_stores/*.py
scripts.check: npm run check:backend && npm run check:frontend
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run fastapi dev main.py
